name: timedatectl
description: Query or change system time and date settings

name: -p
--property
options.description: Show only properties by this name

name: -a
--all
options.description: Show all properties, including empty ones

options.name: --value
options.description: When showing properties, only print the value

subcommands.name: set-local-rtc
subcommands.description: Control whether RTC is in local time

args.name: bool
args.description: Whether RTC is in local time

subcommands.description: Enable or disable network time synchronization

--property

subcommands.description: Set the interface specific NTP servers

subcommands.name: revert

options.description: Do not pipe output into a pager
